title: Graphic Doodle
description: Ce style présente une esthétique de gribouillage contemporaine et ludique, caractérisée par des contours expressifs à l'encre noire et des remplissages vectoriels plats et sans ombres. Il utilise une palette de couleurs très restreinte, s'appuyant sur des contrastes saisissants entre des zones blanches nettes, des motifs géométriques noirs denses et des couleurs d'accentuation vibrantes. La composition est dynamisée par des éléments graphiques flottants, des lignes d'action rayonnantes et une typographie fantaisiste qui créent une atmosphère dynamique de carnet de croquis.
prompt: Digital 2D flat vector illustration, contemporary doodle art style, hand-drawn ink aesthetic with clean digital execution. Apply this style to the complete scene described by {{subject}}, preserving its factual content, camera angle, framing, spatial layout, and stated exclusions. The linework features bold, expressive, solid black contour lines with varying, pressure-sensitive weight, achieving a loose but precise inking style. Employ a highly restricted minimalist color palette using stark black, crisp white, {{primary_color}} flat fills, and {{accent_color}} accents, all set against a {{secondary_color}} flat background space. Utilize absolute flat coloring with zero gradients, zero shading, zero ambient occlusion, and zero highlights. Incorporate playful floating graphic elements around the main focal points, such as radiating action lines, exclamation points, whimsical squiggles, floating dots, and loose hand-written style text scribbles to generate an energetic rhythm. Include bold geometric patterns, particularly thick black-and-white diagonal stripes, within secondary shapes to create high-contrast visual interest and structural mass. The texture is a perfectly smooth, matte digital finish with no grain, canvas weave, or brushstrokes. Lighting is completely flat; form and depth are established entirely through overlapping solid shapes, hard crisp vector edges, and thick black outlines rather than illumination or shadow. The image MUST occupy the absolute ENTIRE dedicated space as a canvas rule: NO borders, NO frames, NO white margins, NO canvas edges, FULL BLEED to all four corners. digital illustration, contemporary doodle art, flat vector graphics, expressive black ink outlines, limited color palette, stark contrast, geometric stripes, floating action lines, playful sketchbook aesthetic, hard vector edges, flat coloring, zero shading, 2d spatial dynamics, full bleed, edge-to-edge, no border, no frame
background_prompt: A vibrant, abstract environment in a contemporary digital doodle art style, featuring flat 2D vector layouts. The scene is composed of overlapping organic and geometric shapes with bold, solid black outlines and varying line weights. Thick black-and-white diagonal striped masses contrast with flat {{primary_color}} and {{accent_color}} forms against a {{secondary_color}} backdrop. The space is energized by floating graphic elements like squiggles, dots, and radiating action lines. Completely flat lighting, zero gradients, smooth matte finish, no central subject.
description_en: This style features a contemporary, playful doodle aesthetic characterized by bold, expressive black ink outlines and flat, unshaded vector fills. It utilizes a highly restricted color palette, relying on stark contrasts between crisp white areas, heavy black geometric patterns, and vibrant accent colors. The composition is energized by floating graphic elements, radiating action lines, and whimsical typography that create a dynamic, sketchbook-like atmosphere.
description_fr: Ce style présente une esthétique de gribouillage contemporaine et ludique, caractérisée par des contours expressifs à l'encre noire et des remplissages vectoriels plats et sans ombres. Il utilise une palette de couleurs très restreinte, s'appuyant sur des contrastes saisissants entre des zones blanches nettes, des motifs géométriques noirs denses et des couleurs d'accentuation vibrantes. La composition est dynamisée par des éléments graphiques flottants, des lignes d'action rayonnantes et une typographie fantaisiste qui créent une atmosphère dynamique de carnet de croquis.
